[Question]
What could be the possible causes of toothache?

Toothaches can be caused by various factors such as cavities, gum disease, cracked teeth, abscesses, or even grinding and clenching of teeth. Additionally, certain medical conditions like sinus infections or TMJ disorders may also lead to tooth pain. Poor oral hygiene, biting or chewing on hard objects, and consuming sugary or acidic foods and drinks can also contribute to toothaches.

However, it would be more accurate to say that toothaches are usually caused by dental problems.

The origin of chocolate dates back to ancient Mesoamerica, specifically to the regions of modern-day Mexico and Central America.
